chunk.text: Tax law General remarks regarding tax law in New Caledonia Main taxes in New Caledonia Specific mining tax law The “pacte de stabilité” and the “mining and metallurgical tax” Main taxes in New Caledonia Principal taxes due by Companies (general law): • Company Income Tax (IS): 30% • Additional solidarity contribution (Contribution sociale additionnelle - CSA): from 5% to 15% applicable to companies subject to the 30% tax rate, for profits in excess of XPF 200 M • Withholding tax on dividends (Impôt sur les Revenus de Valeurs Mobiliers - IRVM): distribution tax of 13.25 % • Business licence tax (Contribution à la Patente - Patente) • Tax on services (Taxe de Solidarité sur les Services - TSS) : 5% on services • Import taxes and duties: up to 60% Mining Tax Law Specificities of mining tax law: IS tax rate: 35% for mining and metallurgical operatives (exploration, extraction, exploitation and operation) TSS: general law exemptions granted to the mining industry Import taxes and duties: exemption regime granted in the context of the construction of plants TSS: exemption regime granted in the context of the construction of plants “Taxe superficiaire” Tax incentive regimes

chunk.text: Descombes & Salans Noumea – New Caledonia GENERAL OVERVIEW ON LEGAL ISSUES FOR MINING PROJECTS IN NEW CALEDONIA 5th NEW CALEDONIA NICKEL CONFERENCE Outline Introduction Environmental Sensitivity Corporate aspects Employment law aspects Tax aspects Mining Law Introduction General presentation of New Caledonian institutions The laws applicable in New Caledonia – Division of power (general) – Mining law in particular Environmental sensitivity Environment: Legislative power essentially held by the Provinces Sensitivity regarding the mining industry Corporate aspects Conditions for carrying on a mining activity in New Caledonia • An individual whose domicile is in New Caledonia • A company with its registered office in New Caledonia • Branch office of a European law company • Choice of legal structure Foreign investment Employment law aspects Types of employment contracts • Open ended contracts • Fixed term contracts • Site contracts Remuneration Working hours • Legal working hours: 39 hours per week • Quota of additional hours Protection of New Caledonian job market

chunk.text: Specificities in Mining Law Pacte de stabilité Mining and metallurgical contribution Mining regulation The Plan for the Development of Mining Resources The Mining Code The Mining Code Personal Mining Authorisation (APM) Research Permit Authorisation for research works Authorisation to occupy the land Mining Concession Ore export regulations Acquiring an interest in a mining company or in mining titles Contact  Frédéric DESCOMBES Managing Partner Avocat f.descombes@descombes-salans.com Descombes & Salans Noumea, NEW CALEDONIA Tel: +687 26 04 04 Fax: +687 26 04 05 www.descombes-salans.com
